verdict_summary: duckduckgo (duck.ai) Korean APF warning successfully rendered as assistant response — DONE confirmed (no S2 staleness regression after 17 days).

evidence.warning_text_quote: ⚠️ 이 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다. 민감한 정보가 포함된 요청은 외부 AI 서비스로 전송할 수 없습니다.
evidence.console_errors_excerpt: (DevTools not opened — primary verdict via DOM/visual inspection; Korean warning bubble clearly rendered as GPT-5 mini assistant turn after submitting PII prompt)
evidence.url_after_submit: https://duck.ai/ (chat session — title set to '내 주민등록번호는 880101-12345...')

recommendation: DONE confirmed. duckduckgo S2 still functional after 17-day staleness window. No action required; keep in DONE bucket. Phase B canary #2 PASS.
notes: First submit attempt redirected to a transient Duck.ai 'something went wrong' error page; user clicked 'Duck.ai 다시 불러오기' which restored the session — the prior submit had still been registered (chat appeared in left sidebar with title '내 주민등록번호는 880101-1234567 ...'). Opening that saved chat showed the GPT-5 mini turn carrying the APF Korean warning bubble (contains '차단'). RRN digits appear only inside the user's own message bubble (echoed input), never decoded or interpreted in the assistant response. Verified visually via screenshot. Model selector shows GPT-5 mini (default 빠른/fast tier).
